visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicant going for Researcher purpose need to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees
Visa fee will be OMR 51
Ukrainian OMR 0.000
No visa fee waiver for this category of travel except for holders of diplomatic and service passports.
Please note:
- VFS Global service charge per applicant is OMR 3.880 (inclusive of 5% VAT) payable in Cash or by Card.
- Please note fee are not refundable.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.

## Documents Required
Residence Permit For Researcher - Long Stay (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3SsYCmwFyex7yusJg5YCf7/01bc9d0e7d7968b781c722274629e7d0/Residence-Permit-For-Researcher.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Z8Xb9jnV8AuQ5xONVhXIm/ff2cbc5b39ddfdb5ff1d26d4d7d8f922/Biometric-photograph.pdf)

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 2 weeks to 6 months, provided that a complete file is submitted.
Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Oman

Application Long Stay (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3D8PZsgt7A8FHkfMQgFeGU/856a33e3808640ab58ee58fa957d2a85/Application-Long-Stay.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Family members of EEA citizens, who hold a blue coloured residence documentation in their passports with the document type ’RESIDENCE CARD OF A FAMILY MEMBER OF AN EEA NATIONAL’ are not required to have a visa in order to travel to Hungary if either of the conditions below apply.
- If joining the EU/EEA National in Hungary, providing the invitation letter and a copy of the ID of the EU national
- If traveling together with the EU/EEA National to Hungary.
Family members of EEA citizens not holding the above mentioned card, i.e. the residence card of a family member of an EEA national, need a visa to travel to Hungary. They should apply for a visa and prove that they are either traveling together with their EEA national family member(s) or traveling in order to meet their EEA national family member(s) (both cases should be proven by joint flight tickets or a letter from the EEA national family member and a single return flight ticket respectively) Please see other supporting documents required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Family members of EEA citizens, who hold a blue coloured residence documentation in their passports with the document type ’RESIDENCE CARD OF A FAMILY MEMBER OF AN EEA NATIONAL’ are not required to have a visa in order to travel to Hungary if either of the conditions below apply.
- If joining the EU/EEA National in Hungary, providing the invitation letter and a copy of the ID of the EU national
- If traveling together with the EU/EEA National to Hungary.
Family members of EEA citizens not holding the above mentioned card, i.e. the residence card of a family member of an EEA national, need a visa to travel to Hungary. They should apply for a visa and prove that they are either traveling together with their EEA national family member(s) or traveling in order to meet their EEA national family member(s) (both cases should be proven by joint flight tickets or a letter from the EEA national family member and a single return flight ticket respectively) Please see other supporting documents required.

## Visa Fees

[hun > omn > en > Table:EEA/EU Nationals (Short Stay upto 90 days) > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
Applicant shall be charged a service fee of OMR 3.880  (all applicable taxes included) per application in addition to the visa fees.
All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/jylKkFO8vYkaNzbWTRjcu/34ac4f8ae2ad0147cf5151c743685ed7/EEAEU-Nationals-Short-Stay-upto-90-days.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent photograph of yourself (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour and :
									
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background are recognizable.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note : Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. A photo booth is available at the centre to help you click photographs meeting these requirements
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Z8Xb9jnV8AuQ5xONVhXIm/ff2cbc5b39ddfdb5ff1d26d4d7d8f922/Biometric-photograph.pdf)

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Oman

## Download Forms
Hungary Application eng (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3eqcvThpBaODcZNMheWRuW/43acf623e21d2a25c8fa7679ae8b1d9e/Hungary-Application-eng.pdf)
Hungary Application hun (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/55wkuCwMdfWVyK4aTg6S0q/458d6f8a1c402054db9b9d91d11955f2/Hungary-Application-hun.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
As an applicant, you will have to provide evidence that you fall under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page for more information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
As an applicant, you will have to provide evidence that you fall under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page for more information.

## Visa Fees

[hun > omn > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
Applicant shall be charged a service fee of OMR 3.800  (all applicable taxes included) per application in addition to the visa fees.
All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please
click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/hun/travel-insurance)
i) Type " C " visa ( Schengen/Short Term visa category)- Information sheets / Checklists
Please check the list of required documents before submitting your application. This will minimise chances of rejection of your visa application due to incorrect or inadequate documents
- Hungary Checklist Business - Omani Nationals (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7Kxd5Vkgjc0iGaAMNBhPLn/7a05fea92c43cca0e94f728e228a9612/Hungary_Checklist-For-Business-Visa_-_Omani_National.pdf)
- Hungary Checklist Business - Non-Omani Nationals (legally residing in Oman) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tB5lXDZVFLm1IQgnfaM4C/a8213666b5530ef232b479e96bed1a6e/hungary-checklist-for-business-visa-non-omani.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent photograph of yourself (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in colour and :
									
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background are recognizable.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling (without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note : Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph presented does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete. A photo booth is available at the centre to help you click photographs meeting these requirements
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Z8Xb9jnV8AuQ5xONVhXIm/ff2cbc5b39ddfdb5ff1d26d4d7d8f922/Biometric-photograph.pdf)

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 15 calendar days, provided that a complete file is submitted. Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Oman

## Download Forms
Hungary Application eng (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3eqcvThpBaODcZNMheWRuW/43acf623e21d2a25c8fa7679ae8b1d9e/Hungary-Application-eng.pdf)
Hungary Application hun (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/55wkuCwMdfWVyK4aTg6S0q/458d6f8a1c402054db9b9d91d11955f2/Hungary-Application-hun.pdf)

## Overview
Applicant going for Employment purpose to apply for the given category.

## Visa Fees
Visa fee will be OMR 51
Ukrainian OMR 0.000
No visa fee waiver for this category of travel except for holders of diplomatic and service passports.
Please note:
- VFS Global service charge per applicant is OMR
3.88
(inclusive of 5% VAT) payable in Cash or by Card.
- Please note fee are not refundable.
Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.

## Documents Required
Residence Permit For Employment - Long Stay (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3V7gQ8Xn6abfuWDwOCXOcz/e2379347ce3c4299df2ab3131fbb4531/EMPLOYMENT-checklist-New.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Z8Xb9jnV8AuQ5xONVhXIm/ff2cbc5b39ddfdb5ff1d26d4d7d8f922/Biometric-photograph.pdf)

## Processing Time
Applications accepted at the Hungary Visa Application Centre will be submitted on the next working day to the Embassy of Hungary for a decision.
The visa processing time is a minimum of 2 weeks to 6 months, provided that a complete file is submitted.
Please note: the process may take longer in certain cases.
All visa decisions are solely at the discretion of the Embassy of Hungary, Oman
